Qwen3-MoE qk_norm and rope ops account for a non-trivial proportion in model inference. See below:

Take Qwen3-30B-A3B for example, it has 48 Decode Layers. Each layer runs qk_norm and rope embedding ops. So this kernel enhancement can be amplified in linear along with the scale of the m

Epoch-based interruption

sglang.title: [feat] use cachebuffer to store mm feature to speedup hash
sglang.author: liusy58
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Current behavior: Multimodal features are stored on CPU.
Why it's slow: CPU hash computation on large feature tensors is slow.
Why not use SGL_USE_CUDA_IPC? It keeps features on GPU permanently, which may cause OOM when handling many requests or large images.
Solution
Pre-allocated GPU bu

vllm.author: ZhiweiYan-96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Quark Fused Moe meets acc issue in DeepSeek-R1 Expert Parallelism. This PR fixes it through setting the right expert mask with format required by aiter kernel. The aiter kernel requires the mask to be a bitmask. 1 means the expert is on current rank, while 0 is not.

vllm.title: [Perf] Remove sync point in vit torch sdpa attn backend
vllm.author: DamonJiang777
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
When we use torch sdpa vit aten backend,  the way to get q_i, k_i, v_i introduce sync point inside the loop。
Here is the profiler.

sdpa_before.pt.trace.json.gz
So I remove the q_i, k_i, o_i outside of the loop, atfer that can significantly reduce the number of sync points.

sdpa_after.pt.tr
